title: Rich Polish Vegetarian Sausage Pho
description: A hearty Vietnamese pho featuring chewy Polish vegetarian sausage, aromatic fish stock, and vibrant herbs, perfect for a monsoon drizzle.
instructions: Bring a pot of water to a boil and blanch the sliced Polish vegetarian sausage for 2 minutes to reduce raw flavor; drain and set aside.

In a large pot, combine fish stock, water, sliced onion, ginger, star anise, cinnamon stick, cloves, and cardamom pods; bring to a boil, then reduce to a gentle simmer for 20 minutes to infuse the aromatics.
Strain the broth through a fine sieve, return the liquid to the pot, and add fish sauce, soy sauce, and brown sugar; stir until the sugar dissolves and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Soak the rice noodles in hot water according to package instructions (typically 4–5 minutes), then drain and set aside.
To assemble, place a portion of noodles, blanched sausage, sliced onions, scallions, bean sprouts, herbs, red chili, and jicama in each bowl.
Pour the hot broth over the contents of each bowl until well covered.
Top with lime wedges, a drizzle of fresh lime juice, and crushed peanuts if desired.
Serve immediately, allowing diners to squeeze lime juice, sprinkle herbs, and adjust seasoning to taste.
